nasb.text: Now Joseph had been taken down to Egypt; and Potiphar, an Egyptian officer of Pharaoh, the captain of the bodyguard, bought him from the Ishmaelites, who had taken him down there.

esv.text: Now Joseph had been brought down to Egypt, and Potiphar, an officer of Pharaoh, the captain of the guard, an Egyptian, had bought him from the Ishmaelites who had brought him down there.

cnv.text: 約瑟被帶下埃及去了。有一個埃及人，是法老的臣宰，軍長波提乏，從那些帶約瑟下來的以實瑪利人手裡買了他。

ccb.text: 约瑟被以实玛利商人带到埃及，卖给了法老的内臣护卫长波提乏。

csbs.text: 约瑟被带下埃及。有一个埃及人，是法老的内臣、护卫长波提乏，从那些带约瑟下来的以实玛利人手中买了他。
